Daily Feedstock Throughput (tons/day
==================================================

.. math::

   \text{}

.. raw:: html

   <table class="kpi-table">
      <tbody>
         <tr>
            <td>Description</td>
            <td><ul><li>Average processing rate of material over the measurement period</li><li>typically normalized to daily capacity</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Objective</td>
            <td><ul><li>Maximize utilization while respecting equipment and constraint limits</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Formula</td>
            <td>
               <p>Calculated directly from the inputs found in the code implementation.</p>
               <div class="math-equation">$$ \mathit{Result} = \frac{\mathit{Daily\,Feedstock\,Throughput\,(Tons}}{\mathit{Day)}} $$</div>
            </td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Used in KPI(s)</td>
            <td><ul><li>This KPI can serve as an input to higher-level operational and performance dashboards</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Input Measure</td>
            <td><ul><li>Total feedstock processed and the number of operating hours in the measurement period</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Unit of Measure</td>
            <td>tons/day</td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Reporting Source</td>
            <td>Operations data sources such as historians, SCADA/DCS tags, and production logs.</td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Comments</td>
            <td>No additional comments or special considerations were provided for this KPI.</td>
         </tr>
      </tbody>
   </table>

   :class: dropdown
